license_or_terms: Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 4.0 for CIFAR-10H human labels; CIFAR-10 image/original label data from University of Toronto CIFAR-10 source.
citation: Peterson, J. C., Battleday, R. M., Griffiths, T. L., & Russakovsky, O. (2019). Human uncertainty makes classification more robust. ICCV. CIFAR-10H GitHub release: https://github.com/jcpeterson/cifar-10h
download_or_source_notes: Downloaded data/cifar10h-raw.zip from the official jcpeterson/cifar-10h GitHub repository. Attention-check rows and negative image indices excluded.
notes_on_label_independence: Rows are individual Amazon Turk annotator trials; annotator IDs are anonymized release IDs. Each CIFAR-10 test image has repeated independent human labels after filtering.
known_biases_or_filters: Primary filter removes attention checks. Gold labels are CIFAR-10 benchmark labels, not human consensus.
